seoTitle: Harmers Haven vs Harrow — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Harmers Haven and Harrow. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Harmers Haven vs Harrow: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Harmers Haven and Harrow.
heading: Harmers Haven vs Harrow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Harmers Haven, Victoria and Harrow, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Harmers Haven has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Harrow (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Harmers Haven or Harrow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Harmers Haven has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Harrow scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Harmers Haven scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Harrow scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Harmers Haven or Harrow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Harmers Haven has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
